title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Explodes 260% to Nearly $10, Breaks Into Top 40 Cryptocurrencies
excerpt: RaveDAO token has surged an incredible 260.65% in 24 hours, reaching $9.98 and catapulting into the top 40 cryptocurrencies by market cap. The dramatic price rally has positioned RAVE as one of the most explosive performers in today's crypto market.
